name: zaunekko
description: ZaunEkko's public-release-ready Claude Code marketplace for purpose-specific plugins and documented compatibility distributions.

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: A third-party compatibility distribution of Anthropic's commit-commands plugin with compact dynamic current-model attribution, optional effort metadata, and a PreToolUse guard that blocks direct Git commits inside Claude Code. Enable it instead of, not alongside, the official distribution.
